task:
In Google Chrome, open these four URLs each in its own tab so all four remain open simultaneously:
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linux
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open-source_software
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ubuntu
4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linus_Torvalds

Bookmark exactly the Linux page (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linux) and the Linus Torvalds page (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linus_Torvalds).

verification.description: Tab with Linux Wikipedia page is open
Tab with Open-source_software Wikipedia page is open
Tab with Ubuntu Wikipedia page is open
Tab with Linus Torvalds Wikipedia page is open
Bookmark for Linux Wikipedia page exists
Bookmark for Linus Torvalds Wikipedia page exists
